cards.question: What HTTP method is used to request data from a server?
What HTTP method is used to send data to a server to create a resource?
What HTTP status code means "Not Found"?
What HTTP status code means "Internal Server Error"?
What data format do most modern APIs send and receive?
What is the difference between a query parameter and a path parameter?
cards.answer: Path parameters are part of the URL path (e.g. /users/42); query parameters appear after ? (e.g. ?sort=asc)
